why: Artificial is the moving center that spans made non natural substitute and contrived uses
evidence_summary: WordReference and Webster 1828 both show a split sense inventory
confidence: Model as trajectory not fixed synonym.

why: Synthetic shares non natural and industrial material senses but is more chemically specific
evidence_summary: WordReference synthetic plus food labeling evidence

why: Imitation shares substitute and resemblance logic but presupposes a model to copy
evidence_summary: WordReference imitation plus artificial flowers context

why: Simulated bridges appearance modeling and staged scenarios more than general manufacture

why: Fake is where artificial drifts in feigned or not genuine contexts but it is not the default meaning

confidence: Place as strong attractor not same node.

why: Genuine is an authenticity and sincerity anchor opposed to feigned or copied artificial uses
risk: May overmerge with authentic if not labeled

why: Authentic adds authority provenance and trust to the contrast field
Natural is the strongest origin contrast and a major consumer language opposite
Real anchors actuality and genuineness and should not be merged with realistic
risk: Very broad term with philosophical senses

why: Processed belongs in the industrial and consumer orbit around artificial rather than in the fake basin
evidence_summary: Processed dictionary entry plus additive labeling evidence

why: Constructed is close to the neutral made branch at the center of artificial
